title: lcf-strain-life: an AI-agent-native toolkit for low cycle fatigue analysis
description: A Python library and MCP server for low cycle fatigue strain-life analysis. It reduces strain-controlled test data, fits Basquin, Coffin-Manson, and Ramberg-Osgood models, applies mean-stress corrections, counts variable-amplitude histories with rainflow, accumulates damage, computes notch local-strain life, fits statistical design curves, and handles elevated-temperature creep-fatigue. Material agnostic, validated against published datasets, and callable by AI agents over MCP.
